# Generated by ollama (codegemma)
# Prompt: Write a Deployment Manager template for a complete GCP application stack (Compute Engine, Cloud SQL, Cloud Storage, Load Balancer). Focus on core infrastructure. Skip Cloud Logging and Monitoring configuration to reduce complexity in our initial MVP deployment.
# Category: cloud_monitoring

# Deployment Manager template for GCP application stack

imports:
- path: common/compute.yaml
- path: common/cloudsql.yaml
- path: common/cloudstorage.yaml
- path: common/loadbalancer.yaml

resources:
- name: compute-engine
  type: common/compute.yaml
  properties:
    image: ubuntu-2204-lts
    machineType: n1-standard-4

- name: cloudsql
  type: common/cloudsql.yaml
  properties:
    databaseName: my-database
    username: my-user
    password: my-password

- name: cloudstorage
  type: common/cloudstorage.yaml
  properties:
    bucketName: my-bucket

- name: loadbalancer
  type: common/loadbalancer.yaml
  properties:
    backendService: compute-engine.name
    targetPort: 8080
    urlMap: my-url-map
